userStories.title: CLI 增加 --epic --story
userStories.description: parse-and-write-score.ts parseArgs 支持 --epic、--story；runId 生成 dev-e{epic}-s{story}-{stage}-{ts}；Usage 补充
acceptanceCriteria: npx ts-node ... --epic 6 --story 3 检查 scoring/data run_id 含 dev-e6-s3-

userStories.title: 从 reportPath 解析 epic/story

acceptanceCriteria: --reportPath specs/epic-6/.../AUDIT_spec-E6-S3.md run_id 含 dev-e6-s3- 或 e6-s3
